description_long: This stereo sound system consists of three main speaker units: a large central subwoofer and two smaller satellite speakers positioned on either side. The central unit features two prominent oval speaker cones on its front face, encased in a matte black rectangular housing. The satellite speakers each have two circular speaker cones, also set within black rectangular enclosures. The rear and sides of all units are plain, lacking visible ports, controls, or branding. The overall design is minimalist and modern, with sharp edges and a uniform dark color scheme. This setup is typical for home or small venue audio systems and would be suitable for placement in urban environments such as garages, living rooms, or community centers.
description: A modern, matte black stereo sound system with a large central subwoofer and two smaller satellite speakers, each featuring visible speaker cones. The design is minimalist and uniform, with no visible controls or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central subwoofer with two oval speaker cones and both satellite speakers with their circular cones visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the central unit and the side profile of one satellite speaker, with speaker cones partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain backs of all three speaker units, with no visible features or details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the depth of the central unit and the other satellite speaker's side profile.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: The speaker grilles are plain, with no visible mesh or perforation pattern, and appear as solid dark surfaces over the speaker cones.
